donate.title: Donate
donate.subtitle: Every contribution brings hope to an animal in need.

vet.title: Vet Visit
vet.description: Covers a routine checkup and vaccination.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: All donations go directly to animal care, treatment, and food costs. You can see detailed spending in our transparency reports.
faq.q2: Can I get a donation receipt?
faq.a2: For a receipt, please contact us via email or WhatsApp.
faq.q3: Can I make a recurring donation?
faq.a3: Yes! You can set up a standing bank order for monthly donations.
faq.a4: Yes, we accept international donations via PayPal and Wise.
faq.q5: Can I donate supplies instead of money?
faq.a5: Yes! Contact us for our needs list. We accept food, litter, medicine, and blankets.

transparency.title: Transparent Management
transparency.description: We regularly publish all income and expenses. You can always see where your donations go.
